text:
is a in the Survey Corps Fourth Squad under the command of Hange Zoë.

Appearance

Rashad sports a short, light-colored haircut; with it trimmed close to the scalp in the back. He wears the standard Survey Corps uniform.

Personality

While Rashad is shown to be a brave and conditioned soldier, he also showed himself to be a rather considerate man, watching over Ymir's damaged body with Nifa. He is also shown to prioritize his fellow soldiers' well-being over immediate threats to himself, retrieving water to soothe burned soldiers while engaged with the Colossus Titan.

Story

Clash of the Titans arc

In Ehrmich District, Hange goes over a report about Annie Leonhart's background with a number of soldiers, including Rashad.

When the Survey Corps regroups atop Wall Rose, Rashad examines Ymir's comatose body with Nifa. Shortly after, Bertolt Hoover and Reiner Braun betray the Survey Corps and attempt to kidnap Eren Yeager and Ymir. One of the soldiers is burned by the steam from Bertolt's Titan in the process, and Rashad asks for water to soothe him. Hange leaves Rashad in command of Teams three and four, and orders them to stay on standby behind Bertolt's Colossus Titan form while Hange helps Eren attack Reiner. The ensuing battle leaves Rashad seriously injured and unable to participate in the mission to rescue Eren and Ymir.

Trivia

Rashad is an Arabic name meaning "righteous" or "blameless."
Rashad is not among the 9 survivors of the Battle of Shiganshina District which suggests he is either dead or left the Survey Corps prior.
